question: Create a `Movie` class with `title` (string), `director` (string), and `releaseYear` (int). Implement a constructor where `director` and `releaseYear` have default values (e.g., 'Unknown' and 2000), allowing movies to be created with just a title.

test_cases.input: Movie movie2("The Dark Knight", "Christopher Nolan"); movie2.displayMovie();
test_cases.expected: Title: The Dark Knight, Director: Christopher Nolan, Year: 2000
Title: Interstellar, Director: Christopher Nolan, Year: 2014

errors: Missing semicolon after the class definition of 'Movie'.
